query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.
Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Vermont Agency of Education Special Education

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live official Vermont Education Dashboard Organization Information dataset and current 2025 rows on data.vermont.gov.

samples.sample_name: Vermont Education Dashboard Organization Information dataset
samples.evidence_snippet: The public dataset is named Vermont Education Dashboard: Organization Information and describes itself as organization information from 2004-2025.
The reviewed schema exposes SchoolCity, SchoolOrganizationName, SchoolAddress, SchoolYear, SupervisoryUnionOrganizationName, and SupervisoryUnionOrganizationIdentifier.
Current 2025 rows map Beeman Elementary School in New Haven, Bristol Elementary School in Bristol, and Monkton Central School in Monkton to MT ABRAHAM UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT.
The same reviewed rows map Ferrisburgh Central School and Vergennes schools to the named ADDISON NORTHWEST SD district.

query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed 2026-06-25 the live first-party Disability Rights Vermont homepage on disabilityrightsvt.org.

samples.sample_name: Disability Rights Vermont homepage rights statement
samples.evidence_snippet: The live homepage headline says Advocating for the legal rights of Vermonters with disabilities.
The same first-party page states that Disability Rights Vermont is part of the national Protection and Advocacy system.
The reviewed homepage says DRVT provides information, referrals, and advocacy services to individuals with disabilities across Vermont.

samples.sample_name: Vermont Family Network PTI designation metadata

samples.sample_name: Vermont Family Network statewide support scope
samples.evidence_snippet: The same reviewed description calls Vermont Family Network a statewide family support organization for Vermont families of children with special health needs.

samples.evidence_snippet: Vermont Legal Aid helps Vermonters faced with a civil legal problem and offers Get Free Legal Help.

Reviewed 2026-06-25 the official Vermont DCF child-care provider open-data dataset plus the live AHS and DCF office-directory surfaces to determine whether a public AHS district-to-office crosswalk exists.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-25 one more bounded official Vermont county-local pass. The official DCF Vermont Child Care Provider Data dataset on `data.vermont.gov` publicly preserves both `County` and `AHS District` fields, and its field description says `AHS District` is `The three-letter abbreviation for which Agency of Human Services district office jurisdiction the provider's town is in.` Sample rows publicly show town-and-county jurisdiction pairs such as Williston / Chittenden / BDO, East Montpelier / Washington / MDO, North Hero / Grand Isle / ADO, and Bethel / Windsor / HDO. But the live AHS root `https://humanservices.vermont.gov/` and the DCF offices page `https://dcf.vermont.gov/contacts/partners/offices` both returned HTTP 403 CloudFront error pages in this pass, and no reviewed public official dataset or page decodes those AHS district abbreviations into office names, addresses, contacts, or county-served assignments. Vermont therefore still lacks a reviewable public county-to-office assignment contract.

samples.sample_name: Vermont Child Care Provider Data dataset
samples.evidence_snippet: The official DCF dataset publicly preserves County and AHS District fields for Vermont provider towns.
The reviewed field description says AHS District is the three-letter abbreviation for which Agency of Human Services district office jurisdiction the provider town is in.

samples.sample_name: Vermont county and AHS district sample rows
samples.evidence_snippet: Reviewed rows show Williston / Chittenden / BDO, East Montpelier / Washington / MDO, North Hero / Grand Isle / ADO, and Bethel / Windsor / HDO.

samples.sample_name: Agency of Human Services root returns 403
samples.evidence_snippet: The live AHS root returned HTTP 403 with a CloudFront error page during the reviewed office-directory pass.
The reviewed DCF offices page also returned HTTP 403, leaving no public official office-name or county-served crosswalk on the current host family.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the current official Vermont AHS Field Services public ArcGIS item metadata, MapServer layers, and public office-services table for local-routing evidence.

samples.sample_name: AHS Field Services Map item metadata
samples.evidence_snippet: The public AHS Field Services Map says it provides up-to-date AHS Field Office district boundaries, field office locations, field services, and district contact information, and says twelve AHS Field Offices serve as local administrative centers covering individuals within towns included in each district.

samples.sample_name: AHS Field Services MapServer layer inventory
samples.evidence_snippet: The public MapServer exposes a Service Office point layer and an AHS District Contacts polygon layer for the official field-services map.

The district-contact layer publicly returns 12 AHS districts with district labels plus director names, phones, emails, and district websites, including Barre District, Bennington District, and Burlington District.

The service-office layer publicly returns 23 office locations statewide, including Barre at 255 North Main Street and 5 Perry Street, Bennington at 200 Veteran’s Memorial Drive and 324 Main Street, and Burlington at 50 Cherry Street and 426 Industrial Avenue in Williston.

The public Office table lists named services and divisions at each office location, including AHS District Office entries and Department of Disabilities, Aging, and Independent Living HireAbility entries such as Barre at 5 Perry Street, Suite 100.
